title: Interdistrict Transfers: Public Education Grants
description: Students who attend a school rated "Unacceptable" by the state may have the right to transfer to a higher-performing campus, either within Conroe ISD or in another district, through the Public Education Grant program. The district outlines how families can request these transfers and what steps are followed to make them happen. Understanding this process helps parents know their options if their child's school is not meeting state performance standards.
